location.unavailable_body: Walk My Way requires your precise location to calculate personalized walking routes. Please allow location access in your browser and try again.
location.error_not_supported: Your browser does not support geolocation.
location.error_denied: Location permission was denied. Please allow access in your browser settings.
location.error_unavailable: Your position could not be determined. Please check your device settings.
location.error_timeout: Location request timed out. Retrying without high accuracy…
location.error_timeout_final: Location request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.

route.error_server: Unable to connect to the server. Please try again.

autocomplete.no_results: No results found within 15 km of your location.

stops.title: Stops Along the Way
stops.empty_after: to include places along your route.

result.no_stops: No matching stops were found along this route for your selected preferences.

region.unavailable_body: Walk My Way is currently only available in Austria. We’re working on expanding to more regions soon.
